headline: American Express (AXP) Launches ABA Card Partnership And Lands New NFL Payments Deal
summary: American Express (NYSE:AXP) has launched a partnership with the American Bar Association to issue an ABA American Express Business Card tailored to legal professionals. The company has also entered into a multiyear global payments agreement with the NFL, covering payments and exclusive experiences for cardholders. These two new deals highlight how American Express positions itself at the intersection of payments, professional services, and premium experiences. The ABA partnership focuses on...

headline: Mercantile Partners with American Express and the American Bar Association to Launch a Small Business Credit Card for Legal Professionals
summary: Mercantile, a financial services platform and division of Onboard Partners, which is focused on expanding responsible access to credit for small and professional service businesses, today announced a new collaboration with the American Bar Association (ABA) to expand access to purpose-built credit solutions for legal professionals nationwide. headline: American Express Plans Live Audio Webcast of Second-Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
summary: NEW YORK, June 24, 2026--American Express Company (NYSE: AXP) plans to host a live audio webcast of its earnings conference call at 8:30 a.m. (ET) on Friday, July 24, 2026, to discuss the company’s second-quarter 2026 financial results.

headline: Truist Securities Maintains Buy on American Express, Raises Price Target to $375
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Brian Foran   maintains American Express (NYSE:AXP) with a Buy and raises the price target from $360 to $375.

headline: “I Need to Pay Off the Mafia, So I’ll Go Borrow From the Cartel”: Dave Ramsey to a Caller Wanting a HELOC for Amex Debt and a New Car
summary: A caller to The Ramsey Show asked Dave Ramsey and George Kamel whether he should take out a home equity line of credit to wipe out a credit card balance and buy a replacement vehicle.
